scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && node --enable-source-maps artifacts/api-server/dist/static-export.mjs && PORT=23671 BASE_PATH=/ corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/commodities run build
scripts.build:pages: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && node --enable-source-maps artifacts/api-server/dist/static-export.mjs && PORT=23671 BASE_PATH=/global-commodity-intelligence-platform/ VITE_STATIC_API=true corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/commodities run build && cp artifacts/commodities/dist/public/index.html artifacts/commodities/dist/public/404.html
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
